phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è l'ingresso della Pinacoteca, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH leen-GRES-so del-lah pee-na-koh-TEH-kah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: On the first floor, main staircase.

responses.english: On the first floor, main staircase.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora apre la galleria, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah keh OH-rah AH-preh lah gal-leh-REE-ah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, posso entrare con lo zaino, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, POH-ssoh en-TRAH-reh kon loh DZAH-ee-noh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: No, you must leave it at the cloakroom.

responses.english: No, you must leave it at the cloakroom.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il biglietto d'ingresso, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh KOH-stah eel bee-LYET-toh ding-GRES-so, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, serve prenotare per visitare la Pinacoteca, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, SER-veh preh-noh-TAH-reh per vee-zee-TAH-reh lah pee-na-koh-TEH-kah, per fah-VOH-reh
